bare.description: Run in the empty room (`--bare`). Default true.

token_env.description: Env var holding the API token; forwarded to `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` under bare mode.

mode.description: How `system_prompt` combines with the default: append or replace.

system_prompt.description: A system prompt to append to, or replace, the default.

oneOf.description: Append the spec's system prompt to the default.
Replace the default system prompt entirely.

answer_timeout_secs.description:
How long the engine waits on the operator's answer before reaping the run
(exit 123). Unset = wait indefinitely until answered or cancelled.

enabled.description:
Opt-in gate. When false, the engine never wires the ask_user tool, so
claude cannot pause — behaviour is identical to a non-interactive run.

oneOf.description: Branch off HEAD into a git worktree and run there. Requires a git workdir.

isolation.description: Isolation mode: run in place, or branch off HEAD into a worktree.

max_budget_usd.description: Spend ceiling in USD (exit 122). Must be > 0 when set.

max_turns.description: Turn cap (exit 125). Unset = unbounded, limited only by the timeout.

timeout_secs.description: Wall-clock cap in seconds (exit 124). Unset applies the 1800s default.

id.description: Model id (e.g. `opus`). Unset uses claude's default.

env.description: Environment variable names to forward to the plugin, resolved from the parent environment.

mcp.description: Whether the plugin exposes an MCP server to wire in. Unset = inherit the plugin's own default.

context.description: Extra context prepended to the task.

description.description: Human note describing the run. Ignored by the engine.

env.description:
Environment variables to set on the spawned `claude` child, overriding any
value inherited from the parent process, forwarded by a plugin, or derived
from `auth.token_env`. Applied per run to the child only; the host process
environment is never mutated. `BTreeMap` keeps serialization deterministic.

env_remove.description:
Environment variable names to unset on the spawned `claude` child, even if
present in the parent process environment or set by an earlier layer.
Applied last, so removal wins.

identity.description: System-prompt identity: append to or replace the default system prompt.

leash.description: The leash: turn cap, wall-clock timeout, budget ceiling, and isolation.

name.description: Run name; also the source for the transcript and bundle slug.

plugins.description: Plugins to vendor into the disposable kit, keyed by plugin name.

skills.description: Skills to vendor into the disposable kit.

task.description: The prompt handed to the agent.
